---
title: "hello world"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
format:
  revealjs:
    smaller: true
---

```{r setup, include=F}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(emmeans)
library(simglm)
library(latex2exp)  # for betas in ggplots
source('_theme/theme_quarto.R')

theme_set(theme_quarto(title_font_size=42))
theme_update(
  text = element_text(family = 'Source Sans 3'),
  axis.title.y = element_text(angle=0, 
                              vjust=0.5, 
                              hjust = 0,
                              margin = margin(t = 0, r = 10, b = 0, l = 0)
                              ),

  )

dapr2red <- "#BF1932" 
pal <- c("#3173c9", "#ff94b0", "#51b375")
```



## lorem ipsum

dolor sit amet



## lorem ipsum again

dolor sit amet even more





<!-- :::: {.columns} -->
<!-- ::: {.column width="50%"} -->
<!-- a -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!-- ::: {.column width="50%"} -->
<!-- b -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!-- :::: -->



<!-- style="font-size: 70%;" -->

 <!-- <img style="vertical-align: text-bottom; width: 1.5em;" src="figs/material-symbols--draw-outline.svg"> -->
 <!-- <img style="vertical-align: text-bottom; width: 1.2em;" src="figs/material-symbols--person-rounded.svg"> -->
